title: Women's NCAA championship game predictions: South Carolina or UCLA -- and what will decide the title?
content: Dawn Staley's Gamecocks seek their third title in five seasons. UCLA is chasing its first NCAA championship.

title: Not 1, not 2: Adell's 3 HR robberies save Angels
content: Angels outfielder Jo Adell robbed the Mariners of three home runs, including a ninth-inning grab in which he crashed into the seats in the right-field corner, to help preserve a 1-0 win.

title: U-M advances with historic beatdown of Arizona
content: Michigan's 18-point margin of victory over Arizona is tied for the largest in an NCAA men's tournament game between 1-seeds since 1979.

title: Jokic outduels Wemby in 'amazing' OT thriller
content: Nikola Jokic outdueled Victor Wembanyama in a clash of MVP candidates as the Nuggets extended their win streak to eight games.

title: UConn tops Illini, makes 3rd title game in 4 years
content: UConn defeated Illinois in the Final Four to advance to its third national championship game in the past four years.

title: Lendeborg hobbled, vows to play for U-M in final
content: Michigan star Yaxel Lendeborg suffered a left MCL sprain and left ankle sprain in Saturday's win over Arizona, but team trainer Chris Williams told ESPN he is "very confident" the forward will play in Monday's title game.

title: Geno apologizes to South Carolina for outburst
content: UConn coach Geno Auriemma apologized to the South Carolina staff for his emotional outburst at Gamecocks coach Dawn Staley in the closing seconds of their Final Four matchup.

title: Sources: Lakers' Reaves (oblique) out 4-6 weeks
content: Lakers guard Austin Reaves has been diagnosed with a Grade 2 left oblique muscle injury and will be out for the remainder of the regular season.

title: Illinois rues misses after another Final Four loss
content: Illinois added another hard-luck loss in the Final Four, as an uncharacteristic performance from its offense sunk its hopes vs. UConn on Saturday.

title: 🏈 NFL draft QB Hot Board: Stacking 12 best QBs
content: Who are the best quarterbacks in the 2026 class? We sized up the top 12, starting with Fernando Mendoza and Ty Simpson.

title: How Michigan, UConn won Saturday's Final Four -- and keys to Monday's title game
content: ESPN's college basketball crew breaks down what they saw in Indianapolis -- and what could decide the championship.

title: Wetzel: Dawn Staley might not be fazed by Geno's antics, but he still needs to fix this
content: Geno Auriemma is a defining figure in women's basketball, which makes his behavior Friday night all the more disappointing.

title: Sadness in net, Anger on the attack: 'Inside Out' characters reimagined as hockey players
content: Ahead of the Inside Out Classic, we translated each emotion into an on-ice role, complete with strengths and weaknesses.

title: Projections and comps for top running backs prospects in the 2026 draft class
content: We have stat projections for the top running back prospects, from Jeremiyah Love to late-round sleepers.

title: Latest NBA buzz: What we know about Luka's hamstring injury
content: Here's what league insiders are talking about behind the scenes, including when Doncic might be able to return from his latest injury.

title: With Messi goal, Inter Miami get dream moment as they finally find home
content: For months, Inter Miami advertised Nu Stadium with one simple message: "We're coming home.'" On Saturday, in a 2-2 draw with Austin FC, they made good on their promise.

title: Welcome to Mullins Drive: How a small Indiana town is embracing its new March legend
content: The UConn freshman inked his name in Indiana basketball history. His hometown added it to street signs, too.

title: What does the SackSEER model say about the top edge rushers in the 2026 NFL draft?
content: Which prospects will have the most sacks through five NFL seasons? We projected the top edge rushers in the 2026 draft class.

title: Three big trends from Portland, Toronto picks
content: The biggest (and, in some cases, surprising) picks for the Fire and Tempo had a few things in common.

title: Boxing results: Wilder edges Chisora on points, Riley wins cruiserweight title eliminator
content: ESPN has live updates of the heavyweight boxing clash between Derek Chisora and Deontay Wilder from London.

title: Deontay Wilder tells Anthony Joshua 'let's do it' -- the fight makes perfect sense
content: Deontay Wilder appeared to call out Anthony Joshua on Saturday, and it's a fight which makes perfect sense.

title: Final NBA MVP (and ROY) straw poll: Here's who voters are picking to win
content: Can Wemby's late push unseat SGA? Tim Bontemps polls 100 NBA insiders for the latest MVP snapshot. Plus, a look at the race for top rookie.

title: Haaland hits long-awaited Man City hat trick as pressure piles on Liverpool's Slot
content: Erling Haaland's first Manchester City hat trick since August 2024 helped send his side to the FA Cup semifinals in a 4-0 thrashing over Liverpool.

title: Who are the 39 best men's U21 players in the world?
content: For the eighth straight year, ESPN brings you our list of the game's next young stars aged 21 or under. Who is good enough to make it?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Fernandes to urge Man United to sign Portugal teammate
content: Bruno Fernandes has outlined one player he believes should be among Manchester United's midfield targets this summer. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Unusual summer temperature spike in Rayalaseema
content: According to data from the India Meteorological Department (IMD) and local observations, several places are already recording maximum temperatures between 39C and 41.5C

title: Tremors panic residents in ASR district after earthquake in Odisha
content: Panic grips Araku Valley and Paderu as residents step out of their homes following seismic activity on Saturday night; however, no casualties or property damage are reported in the agency areas

title: Assembly elections LIVE: Gherao of judicial officers a reflection of TMC’s ‘maha jungle raj’, says PM Modi
content: Rahul Gandhi said that Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma is India’s most corrupt Chief Minister and added, “He spreads only hatred”

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Case against Youth Congress activist over offering money for poll prediction
content: The accused allegedly offered money for accurate predictions of the margin with which the UDF candidate from the Kayamkulam Assembly seat will win in the April 9 elections

title: Centre fully supporting construction of  Amaravati, says BJP A.P. chief Madhav
content: Besides providing financial assistance, the Union government has helped in firmly establishing it as the sole capital by having the amendment Bill passed in Parliament, he asserts

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: UDF fails to keep its promises: M.V. Govindan
content: Says it is natural for people to question how those who have mishandled disaster relief funds would handle the State’s administration if they come to power

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Another row over food kits erupts in Thrissur
content: 4,000 kits seized from supermarket warehouse at Vadanappally; LDF, UDF accuse BJP of distributing kits to influence voters; protesters accuse actor and BJP leader Devan, who was in a nearby house, from leaving; UDF candidate T.N.Prathapan arrested for protesting; a day ago, there was a similar controversy in Olari

title: CREDAI calls for government action amid rising construction costs
content: Members claim that rising crude oil prices in the international market have led to a massive spike in transportation costs, making the delivery of cement, sand, and bricks significantly more expensive

title: Unlike Amaravati, ‘MAVIGUN’ is practical, feasible, claims YSRCP
content: The party asks Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu to not confine himself to rhetoric, but show tangible and significant progress in the capital city

title: New Delhi sees flood of migrants returning home owing to LPG crisis
content: Rush at New Delhi Railway Station as workers head to Bihar and Uttar Pradesh amid supply delays and black market prices

title: Govt. committed to providing drinking water to people of Anantapur, says Minister
content: Payyavula Keshav inaugurates water treatment plant constructed at a cost of ₹15.35 crore to address the drinking water woes of the people in the district

title: Jagan has least regard for public opinion, says I&PR Minister Kolusu Parthasarathy
content: Citing the three-capital plan and the latest ‘MAVIGUN’ alternative, the Minister says that the YSRCP president has the habit of making serious mistakes and justifying them later on strange grounds

title: Price crash: Anxiety over slow liquidation of tobacco on auction platforms
content: Although the auction season commences in September–October and concludes by March every year, over 24 million kg of tobacco remains unsold on auction platforms in April this year

title: Jagjivan Ram was a true provider of food security, says MLA
content: He was speaking after inaugurating the 119th birth anniversary celebrations of the former Deputy Prime Minister in Kalaburagi

title: Sonam Wangchuk gets warm welcome in Kargil, calls for unity and equal rights for Ladakh
content: Highlighting Ladakh's ongoing demands, he said the issue concerns the entire region and must be addressed collectively

title: Groundwater stress rises in parts of Andhra Pradesh
content: Extraction levels increase to 31.51% as recharge dips; 12 mandals over-exploited, salinity reported in 39 areas, says Central Ground Water Board report

title: WUAs have to ensure optimum utilisation of water resources, says Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu
content: Ahead of the launch of a 100-day action plan to conserve every drop of rainwater and increase groundwater levels, the Chief Minister calls for collective effort to provide irrigation facility to every acre in the State

title: Tamil Nadu polls: If betrayal had a form, it would be Palaniswami, says Stalin
content: Mr. Palaniswami who became Chief Minister ‘suddenly’ was thrown out by the people in the last election itself, the Tamil Nadu Chief Minsiter remarked

title: KPRS, villagers stage protest with empty pots over drinking water crisis in Miriana
content: The motor-starter enabling drinking water supply has been lying defunct leaving villagers to wander with pots in search of water, says KPRS

title: Minister takes exception to Yatnal ‘ridiculing’ Samyukta Patil
content: Shivanand Patil says he is willing to accept the challenge of facing elections thrown at him by Vijayapura MLA in any constituency

title: Search operations stepped up to trace missing Kerala woman trekker in Kodagu’s Tadiandamol
content: Rescue efforts are bolstered by local volunteers and advanced technology as authorities focus on locating G. Sharanya, who vanished during a guided trek in the Tadiandamol hills

title: Government steps up LPG supply, urges calm amid Hormuz concerns
content: Unlike the subsidised domestic 14.2-kg cylinders, the 5 kg bottles, called FTL cylinders, are priced at market rates and do not require any address proof for procurement from a nearby LPG distributorship

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly polls: Residents to boycott voting in protest over delay in building service lanes
content: “Over the past 16 years, political parties have been holding out mere promises on building service lanes during elections but neglect the issue after coming to power,” the federation charged

title: Need for women becoming self-reliant seen
content: Self-defence is not merely a display of physical strength but a reflection of confidence, says Vijayanagara Deputy Commissioner

title: Deadline for completing three regional packages under electricity efficiency scheme extended
content: The Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme (RDSS) is meant for reducing losses and improving power supply; as per the original agreements, the date of completion for all three packages was January 31

title: 'Will blow everything up and take the oil': Trump if Iran doesn't make a deal
content: US President Trump issued a stark warning to Iran, threatening to "blow everything up and take over the oil" if a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz isn't reached swiftly. Tensions escalated following US-Israeli strikes on Iran, disrupting oil markets and regional stability.

title: Meta CTO’s message to engineers and college graduates looking to join technology industry
content: Meta's CTO, Andrew Bosworth, urged aspiring tech professionals to prioritize hands-on building over theoretical study. He emphasized immersing oneself in practical projects, from "vibe coding" with AI tools for software to using Raspberry Pi and Arduino for hardware.  Bosworth advocates for continuous experimentation and action to develop essential skills for the evolving tech landscape.

title: 'Trying to import worst elements': Mamata targets BJP ahead of polls, urges vigil on EVMs
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee accused the BJP of bringing in "paid supporters" and hooliganism to influence elections, while also warning her party workers about potential EVM tampering. Union Home Minister Amit Shah urged voters to cast ballots without fear, as Prime Minister Modi criticized the state's law and order.

title: LSG owner Sanjiv Goenka's reaction goes viral as team registers first win
content: After opting to bowl first at the Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium, Lucknow Super Giants got early wickets. Shami (2/9) struck early blows, dismissing the opening duo of Abhishek Sharma (0) and Travis Head (7) in successive overs. Prince Yadav then removed SRH captain Ishan Kishan, leaving the home side under pressure early in the innings.

title: IPL: Pant’s mature 68 powers LSG to five-wicket win over SRH
content: Mohammed Shami's exceptional opening spell choked Sunrisers Hyderabad, but a strong recovery led by Klaasen and Reddy set a competitive target. Rishabh Pant anchored Lucknow Super Giants' chase, guiding them to a thrilling five-wicket victory with a composed unbeaten half-century in the final over.

title: Amid job cuts, Canadian billionaire Kevin O’Leary points out a good thing about AI layoffs
content: Kevin O'Leary, the Canadian billionaire, asserts that artificial intelligence is elevating human creativity, making artists and storytellers more valuable than ever. He highlights how compelling social media content, especially short-form videos, now commands significant salaries due to measurable customer acquisition. O'Leary believes AI is a powerful productivity tool, fostering new industries and opportunities across all economic sectors.

title: 'Goodwill’ lift turned fatal: Engineering students kill drunk driver, flee with car
content: Three engineering students, driven by greed for a red Alto car, murdered an intoxicated man they offered to help. After initially assisting Suchit Bhojapure, they decided to steal his vehicle and possessions, leading to his brutal killing and disposal of his body. The students were apprehended after blood stains on their shoes betrayed their lies.

title: National Maritime Day: India's oil lifeline churns through conflict waters
content: On most days, India's economic heartbeat is invisible. It does not pulse through stock exchanges or policy corridors but across vast, restless waters where ships move quietly between continents. Yet, when conflict erupts in narrow choke points like the Strait of Hormuz, that invisible system becomes the country’s most visible vulnerability. The ongoing tensions have done exactly that, forcing India to confront a reality it has long managed but rarely foregrounded.

title: Google, Microsoft, Amazon and Meta face an American data centre problem; here’s why
content: Tech giants like Google and Meta face mounting opposition across the US over massive data center projects. At least 11 states are proposing laws to restrict or pause new construction, driven by concerns over power grid strain, rising energy costs, and water usage.

title: MS Dhoni not playing vs RCB: When could he return for CSK?
content: MS Dhoni will miss CSK’s IPL 2026 clash against RCB due to a calf strain, with the team struggling after two losses. While RCB enter confidently, CSK feel his absence. The franchise said he’ll miss two weeks, though coach Stephen Fleming stressed his strong off-field influence. Dhoni could return against KKR on April 14, or later fixtures if recovery takes longer.

title: Rakesh Bedi reveals Sachin Tendulkar's reaction for his 'Dhurandhar 2' performance
content: Actor Rakesh Bedi is receiving widespread acclaim for his role as politician Jameel Jamali in 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge'.  His performance, particularly a viral dialogue and a surprising confession of being an Indian spy, has resonated with audiences, even earning a call from Sachin Tendulkar.

title: ‘Drugged, raped, forced into marriage': Hyderabad woman alleges coerced conversion
content: she provided an outline of a harrowing experience involving deception, physical violence, financial exploitation, and religious coercion. The victim met the accused, Nawaz, when he approached her to rent a shop. She alleged he falsely claimed to have converted to Hinduism and changed his name to Navadurga to gain her trust.

title: Suspected ISIS-linked terror module busted, youth radicalisation plot uncovered
content: Authorities have busted a terror network allegedly linked to ISIS and foreign handlers, accused of radicalizing Indian youth online. Teams across multiple states apprehended suspects involved in spreading jihadi propaganda, including videos of extremist figures. The group reportedly aimed to establish an Islamic State in India, with links traced to Pakistan, Afghanistan, Syria, and Bangladesh.

title: Tech blackout: Why UAE has pulled out from key Rafale deal
content: France will solely finance the upgraded F5 fighter jet program after UAE negotiations collapsed due to a lack of local industry involvement and technology access. This decision comes as France faces increasing defense pressures and competing priorities, highlighting Paris's commitment to maintaining sovereign control over its Rafale program.

title: Bangladesh cricket in turmoil: 4 directors resign, BCB chief says he'll be 'last to go'
content: Seven out of 25 directors have already stepped down, including four who resigned after Saturday’s board meeting. The exits have increased uncertainty around the future of the current administration.

title: Raghav Chadha made to stand like rooster, beaten in ‘secret mansion’: Ex-AAP leader
content: A political row has erupted within the party following allegations against Raghav Chadha. Chadha has vehemently denied these accusations, labeling them a coordinated campaign. This public exchange of claims signifies an escalating internal divide within the party.

title: No handshake! Uzbek GM stuns India's Harikai with 'Namaste' - Watch
content: At the Grenke Freestyle Open, Harika Dronavali offered a handshake while resigning, but Nodirbek Yakubboev responded with a respectful “Namaste,” both smiling. Meanwhile, Keymer and Niemann lead the event. Yakubboev earlier avoided shaking hands with Vaishali, later apologising with gifts. He clarified his actions were due to “religious reasons,” while expressing respect for her and Indian players.

title: ‘Bitter defeat for US’: Iran hails downing of F-15 as America rescues 2nd pilot
content: Iran claims a "bitter defeat" for the US after downing a jet and a C-130, while rescuing a downed F-15 crew member. President Trump, however, hailed the operation as a "daring" rescue, showcasing US "Air Dominance." The clash escalates regional tensions, disrupting vital aid and raising fears of widespread hunger.

title: Abhishek's season of ducks: SRH batter joins Rohit and Samson in unwanted list
content: Abhishek has had a slow start to IPL 2026, scoring 55 runs in three innings, with 48 of those coming against Kolkata Knight Riders in the previous match.

title: Congo to accept deportees from US under new deal with Trump admin
content: Democratic Republic of Congo will accept third-country nationals deported from the US starting April, a deal fully funded by Washington. This expands America's deportation network to Africa, with similar arrangements in Ghana and Cameroon.

title: 'Honour killing in Andhra Pradesh': Father confesses police helped track daughter
content: A father confessed to police that officers helped him locate his daughter, who he allegedly murdered for marrying against his wishes. The victim was handed over to her parents despite stating she was a major and wished to live with her husband. An investigation into the officers' conduct is expected.

title: UFC star Jon Jones accused of reckless driving in roadside clash, driver says let’s settle
content: Former two-division UFC champion Jon Jones was recently involved in a tense roadside confrontation in Albuquerque, New Mexico. The incident surfaced after a video was shared online by a local driver. He claimed that he was nearly hit multiple times by a black truck. What started as a frustrating moment on the road quickly escalated into a face-to-face exchange in a nearby parking lot.

title: Patna horror: Toddler gang-raped by uncle and two friends in field 500m from home
content: A horrific incident unfolded in Patna where a 22-year-old man allegedly gang-raped his three-year-old niece with two friends. The child's cries alerted locals, leading to the accused fleeing. Police swiftly apprehended two suspects, including the uncle, and are pursuing the third. The injured toddler is receiving medical care.

title: Big call! Ishan Kishan opts for Rs 13 crore weapon vs LSG
content: Lucknow Super Giants captain Rishabh Pant won the toss and chose to bowl against Sunrisers Hyderabad. LSG made one change, bringing in Manimaran Siddharth for Anrich Nortje. SRH also introduced Liam Livingstone and Harshal Patel into their lineup, aiming for a crucial win after a mixed start to the season.

title: The 'difficult call' Riyan Parag took - and how it paid off for RR
content: Rajasthan Royals secured a thrilling six-run victory over Gujarat Titans, thanks to Riyan Parag's bold bowling decisions at the death. Parag's trust in Tushar Deshpande for the final over, after Jofra Archer's crucial 19th, paid off, boosting his confidence as a leader. Archer's economical over set the stage for Deshpande to defend 10 runs, securing the win.

title: 'Mischievous and must be opposed': Chidambaram slams Centre's move to convene Parliament at poll time
content: Congress leader P. Chidambaram criticized the Centre's decision to convene Parliament from April 16-18, just days before assembly elections in Tamil Nadu and West Bengal.

title: ‘Momos’, ‘Chinki’ slurs: Northeast dance troupe faces racial abuse at Patna station
content: A cultural dance troupe from Arunachal Pradesh faced racial harassment and was denied access to a washroom at Patna railway station. The incident, captured on video, shows a woman using derogatory slurs against the performers. Railway authorities intervened, and the ECR has urged passengers to treat everyone with respect.

title: Inside the world’s most in-demand restaurant, where tables sell out in 10 seconds!
content: Vikas Khanna's restaurant Bungalow-Ek Sau Ek in New York is a culinary sensation. Tables at this celebrated Indian restaurant are booked solid for weeks. Bookings open daily and vanish within seconds. Even former US President Barack Obama has sought a table. The restaurant offers a journey through India's diverse flavours and heritage.

title: Inside India's ghost malls: How nostalgic hangout spots lost their magic
content: India's once-vibrant malls are becoming 'ghost malls,' with nearly 20% underperforming or empty. This decline stems from poor planning, oversupply, and a failure to adapt to changing consumer experiences, not just e-commerce. While some struggle, these spaces offer potential for reinvention into entertainment, co-working, or educational hubs.

title: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge': Ranveer Singh starrer set to surpass Rs 1000cr in India
content: Witness the phenomenal rise of Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' as it takes the cinematic world by storm, breaking records and captivating audiences worldwide. This gripping espionage thriller has not only become the highest-grossing Indian film in North America but is also on the brink of crossing the Rs 1000 crore mark in India. Read on to know more in detail.

title: RCB vs CSK: How has Virat Kohli fared against Chennai in the IPL?
content: Virat Kohli continues his remarkable IPL journey, entering his 19th season with RCB and showcasing his dominance against Chennai Super Kings. He holds the record for most runs against CSK and is nearing another milestone, highlighting his consistent threat to the opposition.

title: 'Hate-spreading CM': Rahul Gandhi slams Himanta Biswa at Assam poll rally
content: Rahul Gandhi attacked Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma, labeling him the 'most corrupt and hate-spreading CM' and vowing to jail him. Gandhi also promised SC/ST status for six communities, higher tea worker wages, and monthly cash transfers for women if Congress forms the government in Assam.

title: Teachers beat 10-year-old in UP madrasa; one holds him down, another strikes with stick
content: Two Urdu teachers were arrested in Saharanpur, UP, after a video surfaced showing a 10-year-old student being beaten at a madrassa. The incident, which reportedly occurred eight months ago, led to the teachers' removal and subsequent arrest following a complaint and video evidence. Police are conducting a detailed investigation.

title: Inside The "Most Daring" Rescue Op In US History: What We Know, And Don't
content: The F-15E Strike Eagle was shot down over southwestern Iran on Friday, the first confirmed loss of a US combat aircraft inside Iran.

title: Odisha Man Rapes Specially-Abled Daughter. She Gives Birth To Baby Girl
content: A man has been arrested for allegedly raping his differently-abled daughter repeatedly in Odisha's Dhenkanal district after she gave birth to a baby girl.

title: "What Happened In Malda Is Example Of Trinamool's Maha Jungleraj": PM Modi
content: Addressing his first election rally in Cooch Behar district after the announcement of polls last month, PM Modi said the entire country had seen how judicial officers were held hostage in Malda.

title: "Flying Objects" Hit, C-130 Plane Downed, 5 Killed In US Pilot Rescue Op: Iran
content: A US fighter jet crew member who was missing for two days after Iran shot down the F-15E warplane was rescued today in one of the most "daring operations" in the history of the United States.

title: War Impact On Crude Oil Raises GST Question. Why It's Easier Said Than Done
content: While the Centre has reduced excise duty on petrol and diesel, states did not reduce their VAT/Sales tax on petroleum products.

title: Woman Killed, Husband Injured After Scooty Dragged Under Truck For 1 Km
content: A 22-year-old woman was killed and her husband seriously injured after a truck hit their scooty and dragged it for nearly a kilometre in Hyderabad's Mindspace area of Madhapur late on Saturday night.

title: Himanta Sarma Responds After Congress Claims His Wife Holds 3 Passports
content: After Congress claims on his wife, Himanta Sarma pointed out six anomalies that included mismatch in name, UAE ID, and nationality

title: Viral Video Leads To Arrest of Milk Theft Gang In Delhi
content: In a swift crackdown, the Anti-Narcotics Squad of Outer District has dismantled a milk theft gang operating in the Uttam Nagar area, arresting two accused who were caught on camera stealing milk and curd supplies.

title: 'Kerala Polls Not To Change Government But To Improve Future': Amit Shah
content: Amit Shah said that NDA vote share in Kerala increased since 2014 Lok Sabha polls and its time for a government of the BJP-led front in the state.

title: Annamalai Back As NDA Campaigner In Tamil Nadu After Months Out Of Spotlight
content: Dismissing speculation over being denied a ticket, Annamalai clarified that he had not sought to contest the polls.

title: Government Medicine Scam Busted In Delhi, Rs 70 Lakh Stock Seized
content: During interrogation, it was revealed that the racket had been operating for the past one to one-and-a-half years through a network of brokers across multiple cities.

title: Iran Says US Airman Rescue Op "Foiled" Hours After Trump's "We Got Him" Post
content: Iran's military said on Sunday that the US operation to rescue an airman from a downed American fighter jet had been "completely foiled", without suggesting he had been captured.

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: US Used Abandoned Airport In Southern Isfahan To Rescue F-15 Crew, Says Iran
content: US-Iran War Live Updates: The speech will offer Trump a wide audience to articulate clear objectives for the war that could attempt to reconcile weeks of changing goals

title: Opinion: Opinion | Mudslinging Starts As AIADMK And DMK Use Karunanidhi In Campaign Rhetoric
content: Muthuvel Karunanidhi is back. Seven and a half years after he passed away, the former chief minister is now the subject of heated barbs between his son MK Stalin and his political rival, AIADMK supremo Edappadi Palaniswami.

title: Why The LPG Crisis Is Forcing Migrants To Quietly Leave Delhi
content: She was preparing to board a train to her village in Boria district, Haryana. Her husband stood a few steps away, holding three large white sacks filled with utensils and avoiding eye contact.

title: BJP Releases Manifesto For Puducherry Assembly Elections
content: Earlier, Prime Minister Narendra Modi said that the opposition parties lack a clear vision for developing the Union Territory and are more focused on political control.

title: UP Woman Was Helping Grandson Park His Thar. Handbrake Error Left Her Dead
content: A 70-year-old woman was crushed to death after a Mahindra Thar car driven by her grandson suddenly reversed from the parking area.

title: Andhra Man Kills Daughter For Marrying Lover, Cop Suspended For Hiding Murder
content: The Macherla town Circle Inspector (CI) traced the couple on March 15 and allegedly forced the woman to return to her parents' house.

title: NBA playoff watch: Can ailing Lakers stay ahead of Nuggets?
content: the Los Angeles Lakers are still the 3-seed in the West, but that position could be rapidly slipping away . the Denver Nuggets will be without stars Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves for the remainder of the regular season . one of those games comes Thursday against the Golden State Warriors .

title: NHL playoff watch: Where the wild cards stand on Sunday

title: Tracking fifth-year options for 2023 first-rounders: Who will return in 2027?
content: the deadline for teams to pick up fifth-year options on the rookie contracts of 2023 first-round draft picks is May 1 . if the team declines the option, the player remains under contract for 2027 . we are tracking the entire 2023 class, which had only 31 picks after the Miami Dolphins were stripped of their first round selection .
